unverified_claims.note: Manufacturing cost reduction of 40% YoY is sourced from Bain & Company 2025 report. However, this is a YoY figure, not a quarterly 3-month figure. Used as the best available proxy for recent momentum. No single-quarter cost data was available.

unverified_claims.claim: Market share percentages for Agibot (~20%), Figure AI (~15%), Boston Dynamics (~12%), Agility Robotics (~10%)
unverified_claims.note: These are directional estimates derived from shipment volume data and industry reporting, not from a single analyst's market share breakdown. No analyst firm has published an authoritative 2025 humanoid market share table as of April 2026. Treat as approximate.

Directionally confirmed via Robozaps citing rising search interest for 'humanoid robot'. The absolute 74,000 figure is an estimate based on secondary reporting; no primary keyword tool data directly queried.

unverified_claims.claim: 1X NEO accepting 2026 pre-orders for consumer home use
unverified_claims.note: 1X Technologies (backed by OpenAI) has announced NEO as a consumer home robot, but specific pre-order details and pricing were not independently verified from a primary source at time of research.
